% Auto-generated PGFPlots figure for schedule_transition_distance_cdf
% Requires: \usepackage{pgfplots,pgfplotstable,xcolor}
% Optional: \usepgfplotslibrary{groupplots}
\providecommand{\postprocessfigurewidth}{\linewidth}
\pgfplotsset{compat=1.18}
\definecolor{CentralMassiveMimoColor}{HTML}{D4A017}
\definecolor{DistributedFixedColor}{HTML}{2F5D8A}
\definecolor{DistributedMovableColor}{HTML}{CB3A2A}
\definecolor{DistributedMovableOptTwoColor}{HTML}{1B9E77}
\definecolor{DistributedMovableOptThreeColor}{HTML}{7570B3}
\begin{tikzpicture}
  \begin{axis}[
    width=\postprocessfigurewidth,
    height=0.62\postprocessfigurewidth,
    xlabel={Relocation distance [m]},
    ylabel={CDF},
    grid=major,
    legend pos=south east,
    ymin=0,
    ymax=1.02,
  ]
    \ifShowStrategyThree
    \addplot[const plot mark right, no markers, line width=1.2pt, color=DistributedMovableColor, solid] table[x=distance_m,y=cdf,col sep=comma] {tikz_data/schedule_distance_cdf_distributed_movable.csv};
    \addlegendentry{\strategy3[short]}
    \fi
    \ifShowStrategyFour
    \addplot[const plot mark right, no markers, line width=1.2pt, color=DistributedMovableOptTwoColor, solid] table[x=distance_m,y=cdf,col sep=comma] {tikz_data/schedule_distance_cdf_distributed_movable_optimization_2.csv};
    \addlegendentry{\strategy4[short]}
    \fi
    \ifShowStrategyFive
    \addplot[const plot mark right, no markers, line width=1.2pt, color=DistributedMovableOptThreeColor, solid] table[x=distance_m,y=cdf,col sep=comma] {tikz_data/schedule_distance_cdf_distributed_movable_optimization_3.csv};
    \addlegendentry{\strategy5[short]}
    \fi
  \end{axis}
\end{tikzpicture}
